AIMessageSendRequest.description: request_id is required; additionally, trimmed content must be non-empty or attachments must contain at least one image. The cross-field rule is also published on the operation.

content.description: Trimmed content must be non-empty when attachments is absent or empty.

ExportTaskDeleteBatchRequest.description: Positive export-task IDs owned by the current user.

JSONValue.description: Any valid JSON value explicitly stored in a json.RawMessage field; invalid or absent stored JSON is normalized to an empty object.

NotificationDeleteBatchRequest.description: Positive notification IDs owned by the current user.

UserBatchProfileRequest.description: Exactly one field-specific variant is accepted.

UserExportRequest.description: Positive user IDs included in this export task.
